news.title: Anthropic Tops OpenAI to Become the World’s Most Valuable A.I. Start-Up
news.snippet: Anthropic raised $65 billion in new fund-raising that put its value at $900 billion, ahead of OpenAI’s last valuation of $730 billion, as the companies duel for A.I. dominance.

news.title: In Argentina, U.S. Tech Billionaire Peter Thiel Finds An Escape
news.snippet: The billionaire’s new roots in Argentina are said to be partly motivated by concerns about the future of the United States and shared beliefs with Argentina’s right-wing leader.

news.title: Joby Demonstrated its Air Taxi in Manhattan, but You Can’t Fly in It Yet
news.snippet: Aviation start-ups and the Trump administration want to replace helicopters with electric aircraft, but the new vehicles still have to pass arduous tests before the public can use them.

news.title: Powerful A.I. Super PACs Duel Over the Midterms: ‘This Is a War’
news.snippet: One super PAC is allied with Anthropic. The other is tied to OpenAI. They’re both spending millions to influence this year’s elections.

news.title: What’s Next for Blue Origin After Rocket Explosion
news.snippet: Jeff Bezos was gaining ground on Elon Musk’s SpaceX and Starlink. Thursday’s rocket explosion on a launchpad creates a major setback.

news.title: At the A.I. Epicenter, Technologists Dismiss Pope Leo’s Warnings About the New Technology
news.snippet: Pope Leo XIV’s spiritual message on artificial intelligence arrived as Silicon Valley’s A.I. enthusiasts pursue their own spirituality through technology.

news.title: SpaceX IPO Filing Reveals Favorable Terms for Elon Musk
news.snippet: The ways it set up its board and Mr. Musk’s pay appear to benefit him at the expense of other shareholders, corporate governance experts said.

news.title: ‘The Maids,’ With Yerin Ha, Asks: Has Life Become One Big Performance?
news.snippet: In his rethinking of Jean Genet’s classic work about class and power, Kip Williams ponders “a world that gives you every opportunity not to be yourself.”

news.title: Massachusetts Uber and Lyft Drivers Form First Union for Ride-Share Workers
news.snippet: The App Drivers Union said it was the first organization in the country to be formally certified to represent drivers for apps such as Uber and Lyft.

news.title: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
news.snippet: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.

news.title: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
news.snippet: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"

news.title: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings

news.title: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos will make competing harder
news.snippet: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.

news.title: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
news.snippet: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.

news.title: Starmer vows to act on social media after meeting bereaved parents
news.snippet: Some parents believe whether the government will take strong enough action remains to be seen.

news.title: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
news.snippet: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.

news.title: How Turkey Hacked the Hair Transplant Industry

news.title: Tello Mobile Plan Review (2026): Low Cost, Reliable Service
news.snippet: With inflation and gas prices rising, I’m trying to save money wherever I can. I tested Tello’s budget cell phone plan, and for me, it turns out prepaid can be just as good.

news.title: 最前线｜中科创星第十二期“好望角科学沙龙”聚焦“太空智驾”，卫星将从被动响应走向自主决策
news.snippet: “太空智驾时代将到来，卫星和星座会如同L4级自动驾驶汽车一样，在太空具备自主环境感知、任务规划和机动决策能力。” 5月28日，在上海举行的“好望角科学沙龙”上，中国科学院西安光学精密机械研究所（简称“西安光机所”）副所长邵晓鹏在演讲中提出了这一判断。

news.title: 千里科技再添筹码，或将整合吉利辅助驾驶团队｜36氪独家
news.snippet:
为助力千里科技成为“第二个华为”，吉利决定为它增添新的技术筹码。
  36氪从多位产业人士处了解到，吉利中央研究院数百人的辅助驾驶团队，将在近期被整合入千里科技。目前，吉利研究院辅助驾驶团队，已有人收到了转移合同的通知。
  有接近吉利的知情人士告诉36氪：“这轮整合后，吉利研究院辅助驾驶团队，被平移至千里智驾与极氪的合资公司千里浩瀚，千里浩瀚今后主要负责为吉利的

news.title: 36氪首发｜「穿越者」载人航天公司完成新一轮亿元融资，某头部互联网战投领投，探路者等跟投
news.snippet:
36氪获悉，北京穿越者载人航天科技有限公司（以下简称“穿越者”）近日完成Pre-A轮亿元融资，由某头部互联网战投领投，探路者集团等跟投，老股东中天汇富、彬复资本持续加注。光源资本担任本轮独家财务顾问。本轮融资资金将重点用于“穿越者壹号（CYZ1）”载人飞船核心系统研发、地面试验验证及关键技术攻关。
  公司方面表示，引入互联网、人工智能、智能制造、户外装备及文旅场景等领域的产业
